name: cloudflare-policy
description: Cloudflare DNS and SSL policy governing DNS record management, SSL configuration, and CDN proxy settings

policy.principle: Cloudflare manages DNS resolution and SSL termination. Apex domain is proxied through Cloudflare CDN. WWW is DNS-only.

authentication.description: Cloudflare API token must have DNS edit and zone read permissions

apex.description: Apex domain points to Vercel IP, proxied through Cloudflare CDN

www.description: WWW subdomain CNAMEs to Vercel, DNS-only (no CDN proxy)

ssl.description: SSL mode set to 'full' for end-to-end encryption via Cloudflare Universal SSL

zoneLookup.description: Zone must exist in Cloudflare before DNS records can be created

cleanup.description: Orphaned DNS records are not automatically removed
